Tart, juicy! Excellent for syrup or for fresh munching. Access: Public.
Foot Hill Ln, Carey, ID 83320, USA
Wild currants grow all along this road. Some are orange (golden) but I've seen red and black mixed in. Tasty! Even my kids will pick for an hour!! Access: Public.
